title: Alert Engine
summary: First-class alerting with rules and model-driven detections.

blocks.heading: Overview
blocks.content: Alerting is a first-class product capability supporting deterministic rules and model-driven detections with human-readable explanations.

blocks.heading: Alert lifecycle
bullets: Deduplication and suppression to reduce noise
Feedback loop to monitor false positives

blocks.heading: Example alert types
bullets: fuel_anomaly — rapid drop in fuel level
theft_suspect — fuel loss without corresponding usage
